{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220421337F2521526E417A5AA3B8"}"},"total":15215},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7246629352435467048","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的是有点把我小小的惊艳到了，因为都是老书虫了嘛，有一段时间比较烦，然后就看末世小说，然后这一系列的我也看了很多，但这一本是我里面比较喜欢的一本。作者逻辑也比较严谨，有一些小细节呀，也处理的很到位，让人阅读起来很安心。人物形象塑造方面也还是可以的，然后作者写了这么多人，这么多变异动物，没有一种很笼统的感觉。总之呢，希望作者加油(ง•̀_•́)ง"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687237482,"group_id":"7164673910623964198","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":""唯飛森林,独渡海渝"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9/cjHPWjz4GLFVfeF2FdDk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d2b1c6079e0c43dfbfb6587106b4460a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710227&x-signature=%2FLJBHF8OOMRITx4IlqN20F8e0Jo%3D","user_id":"580992016065088","user_name":"颂桉屿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"580992016065088","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1732748746,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7164673910623964198","book_info":{"abstract":"（大女主文、丧尸、团队，杀伐果断不圣母）
杀手榜排名第一的白夭夭在末世觉醒空间异能，带领组织的弟兄们成功杀出一条血路，登顶末世十大战力榜，无奈还是死在了末世的第十年，被皇级空间丧尸切割致死。
本以为生命就此终结，没想到一睁眼，不仅回到了末世前的三个月，空间异能也得到进化。
囤物资、修炼异能、杀丧尸，这次，我要通关这末世！
避雷1不是一直激烈战斗，纯干架那种，少极品，整体风格偏诙谐。
2.主角队伍一直12人，但是会有变异兽加入，后期也会有追随的势力，不是扶贫的那种，相互成就。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8a05c2f4e72a79cbdb4cd4c8aa091c8a","author":"张泡泡","author_id":"","book_id":"7164673910623964198","book_name":"囤百亿物资，杀手小队通关末世","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":523,"name":"前世今生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=523&name=前世今生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7164674148961747464","read_count":"107560","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1220557"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"596","tags":"科幻末世,重生,空间,末世,囤物资,前世今生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c4540c90adcec7751b14d57bb2594b05~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308493&x-signature=aFpA6JoEd8cxstfbZ2%2BuFTfK7T4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111174162161","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.7017106e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220421337F2521526E417A5AA3B8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读16小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":292,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":57016,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":135454},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7200999381897249568","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我真的！！觉得这个末世文氛围太好了，没有什么渣男小三没有什么绿茶闺蜜，全都是战友情，贼舒服！！主角超级果断，可烦那些动不动就刻意制造点冲突，动不动谈个恋爱脑子都没了的了！！！","text_exts":[{"e":78,"s":75,"text":"恋爱脑","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%8B%E7%88%B1%E8%84%91&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741244937A5AA3B8%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227200999381897249568%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227164673910623964198%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%8B%E7%88%B1%E8%84%91%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1676613481,"group_id":"7164673910623964198","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"祝大家发财呀！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx82yE41Mme0im6yRsfmB/M=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/25334171a57a44488c2268624fd5e637~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704949&x-signature=EfWXQBjcrFbOqPu1n1t4ErrQd48%3D","user_id":"347052315781389","user_name":"月亮邮差喵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"347052315781389","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1764257282,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":25,"name":"游戏入侵","small_url 本以为生命就此终结，没想到一睁眼，不仅回到了末世前的三个月，空间异能也得到进化。

g_count":318,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":40024,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":138504},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7297979714735276800","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的强烈推荐这本小说，女主夭姐真的我爱死，做事果断不圣母但也有她自己的小细节。暗夜小队的每个人的关系也很融洽，一起提升一起成长，一个个平时看着不着调，每天打打闹闹嘻嘻哈哈的一群人，在遇到问题时都一致对外。
暗夜小队虽名为暗夜但却是冲破黑暗的一束光。他们从开始的不屑冷漠，到中间的纠结、疑惑，再到最后...愿意付出所有，去结束这一切，带领着众人通关末世，他们末世前虽然都是干杀手的但也有心中的善良。虽然末世爆发后许多人的贪婪和阴暗的一面会慢慢放大，但文中后期更多体现出的是人们的团结和努力改变末世的决心。
全文搞笑又精彩，人物形象鲜明各有各的特色。刀子嘴豆腐心的夭姐，爱美的露露，嘴欠的猴子，全能管家大圣，逗逼狗子，稳重大喵，听话的小歪，固执的欧阳宁，暗夜粉丝深夜小队等等不管是人还是兽兽植物们真的都超爱的好吧[飞吻]
入股不亏啊各位，还是第一次如此的强烈的推荐一本书[顶帖]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699194532,"group_id":"7164673910623964198","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/gfed3z2zjdBh9al+9lwq2bL061nzy5nScr9oHByOnw","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ec42bbf8e5b945ca9e86298ebc1b1017~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703646&x-signature=9aMYOFLkwdKPkPhU1hop3KIfHws%3D","user_id":"3035128465198712","user_name":"∮.๓(^～^)"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3035128465198712","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7164673910623964198","book_info":{"abstract":"（大女主文、丧尸、团队，杀伐果断不圣母）
